question: Give me the list of the latest releases of DGG (Deutsche Grammophon Gesellschaft) in chamber music for strings
sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
SELECT ?work ?recording ?label WHERE { ?work rdfs:label "Music for strings"@en . ?work efrbroo:R8_consists_of ?ensemble . ?work efrbroo:R20_recorded ?recording . ?recording rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 10
execution_result: Got no rows and 3 columns in 0.02s

question: Could I find any music for flute and TWO bassoons (strictly)? an interesting combo
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
SELECT ?work WHERE { ?work a efrbroo:F22_Self-Contained_Expression . ?work ecrm:P14_carried_out_by ?instrument . ?instrument rdfs:label "flute"@en . ?work ecrm:P14_carried_out_by ?instrument2 . ?instrument2 rdfs:label "basson"@en . }
execution_result: Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.03s

question: Give me all the operas of which the composer is also the librettist
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?work ?composer WHERE { ?work a efrbroo:F22_Self-Contained_Expression . ?work rdf:type ?operaType . ?operaType rdfs:label "OPERA" . ?work ecrm:P14_carried_out_by ?composer . ?work efrbroo:R17_created ?creationEvent . ?creationEvent ecrm:P14_carried_out_by ?composer . }
execution_result: Got no rows and 2 columns in 0.21s

question: Give me the list of the recordings made in 2014 by Harmonia Mundi with
sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT ?work ?workLabel WHERE { ?work a efrbroo:F22_Self-Contained_Expression ; efrbroo:R17_created ?creationEvent ; dct:created "2014"^^xsd:gYear . ?creationEvent ecrm:P14_carried_out_by <http://data.doremus.org/artist/9d783254-9816-30ef-bb2a-f5ee89a07ea6> . }
